heading: Admission and guide fees exempt from tax
label: 407d Admission and guide fees exempt from tax
text: Any admission fee charged for entrance to Carlsbad Caverns and any fee charged for guide service therein shall be exempt from all taxes on admissions.
notes: Codification, , amended , , which had been classified to this section of the Code, “by striking out that part thereof” upon which this section was based. Said act , however, made no mention of act , which reenacted those same provisions.
